caption: A man with blond hair wearing a dark blue t-shirt and a white headset appears in a small picture-in-picture window in the lower-left corner of a digital screen. He is gesturing with his hands and speaking. The main screen displays a 3D object resembling a stylized, black and lime green block featuring a large, white "U1" logo. The background is a dark blue digital space with horizontal lines and a glowing yellow horizon. As the sequence progresses, the "U1" block moves forward and then suddenly erupts in a flash of yellow and white light. The text "BLITZ PRESENT" briefly appears in the center. Finally, the scene transitions to a vibrant, colorful explosion of pink, green, and blue shapes, with a large, stylized pink "U1" logo centered in the middle of the burst. Small, barely legible text appearing at the bottom reads "JUNMARK", "DUSS", and "TRAX".
